name: Microwave Cranberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Raw cranberries, rinsed and stems removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 quart microwave safe casserole dish, combine the ingredients.
2. Cover with wax paper, not a tight cover or cranberries will boil up and over.
3. Cook on high for 3 to 5 minutes or until berries have popped, stirring after 2 minutes.
